mechanics.excerpt: Recovering takes tne entire turn, so the character will be active again in the next turn and all of his Fatigue will be recovered (although he still has all his wounds): character fell unconscious due to overwhelming Fatigue (as opposed to knockout), he will wake up o his Own once all Fatigue recovered This takes minutes 0i rest outside combat conditions the expenditure single Edge point; Hand Mlnor: Metacarpal bones broken (WV 2; +2 TN t0 aii actions that use affected hand] Serlous: Hand crushed and/Oi finger severed [WV 3; +3 TN to all actions that use affected hand] Critical: Hand crushed and fingeris severed [Wv 6; Knockout Check at +2 TN; Lost Limb (1} Trait; bleeds every minute] Deadly: Hand destroyed (WV 8; Knockout Check at +5 TN; Lost Limb (2) Trait: bleeds every turn] Head Mlnor: Face gashed, bleeds into eyes (WV 2; +3 to all TNs that require vision; bleeds every minutes] Serlous: Concussion [WV 5; Knockout Check at +4 TN: to all TNs| Critical: Major brain damage [WV 10; instant knockout; bleeds every minute] Deadly: Head destroyed Or severed [character instantly killed] EMERGENCY CARE character will quickly die once the total wound value of his wounds.
